span.p:
signs fresh challenge

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(38, 22, 74) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Root key
KMS or HSM only

div.style: color: rgb(16, 33, 58) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Root signed issuer grant
person, skill, policy, expiry

div.style: color: rgb(18, 60, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Issuer child signing key
may issue only this exact skill

div.style: color: rgb(26, 32, 44) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Developer holder key
private key stays with developer

div.style: color: rgb(16, 33, 58) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Issuer signed holder grant
one credential and proof scopes

div.style: color: rgb(16, 58, 38) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Signed skill record
project evidence and current policy

div.style: color: rgb(71, 36, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Status and lineage
active, revoked, replaced

div.style: color: rgb(74, 49, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Project or portfolio
embeds the record

div.style: color: rgb(26, 46, 5) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Verifier checks issuer chain,
holder proof, and current status
